assertions.title: Badge counts display real data

steps.action: Navigate to /cockpit and inspect sidebar badges
steps.expected: Badges with run count on Cockpit and approval count on Inbox/Approvals
steps.observed: Sidebar badges use useLiveRunCount() and usePendingApprovalCount() hooks querying Supabase. Currently both return 0 from Supabase (no running/queued runs, no pending approvals). Sidebar badges conditionally hide when count is 0 (code: liveRunCount > 0 ? liveRunCount : null).
Header badges persistently show '0 live runs' and '0 approvals' from real Supabase queries
useLiveRunCount queries runs table for status in [running, queued]. usePendingApprovalCount queries approvals table for status=pending. Both use refetchInterval: 15000ms.

evidence.network: Supabase queries for runs and approvals tables

assertions.issues: Sidebar nav item badges are conditionally hidden when count is 0. Header badges always show counts. Both data sources are real Supabase queries, not hardcoded. If Supabase had non-zero data, sidebar badges would appear.

steps.action: Check console errors after full flow
steps.observed: Only WebGL getSupportedExtensions error (expected THREE.js cosmetic error in headless Chromium)

assertions.title: Data consistency across views

steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard and note agent count
steps.observed: Dashboard MetricCard shows '2 Agents' (from demo snapshot data)
Agents page shows 'No agents yet' — 0 agents from Supabase query

steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard and note issue count
steps.observed: Dashboard MetricCard shows '2 Open Issues'
Issues page shows 2 issues (ACM-1, ACM-2) — matches dashboard

assertions.issues: Agent count inconsistency: Dashboard MetricCard shows 2 agents (sourced from demo fallback data via useAgencyData/DEMO_SNAPSHOT), but the Agents list page (/agents) queries Supabase directly and shows 0 agents ('No agents yet'). Issue count is consistent (2 on both views). Root cause: Dashboard uses demo fallback data when Supabase agents table is empty, while the Agents list page only queries Supabase without fallback.

frictions.description: Agents page shows skeleton loading states that eventually resolve to 'No agents yet' — initial appearance may confuse testers into thinking data is loading
frictions.resolution: Waited additional seconds for skeleton states to resolve to empty state message

frictions.description: Dashboard uses demo fallback data (DEMO_SNAPSHOT) when Supabase returns empty, while individual pages (agents, etc.) query Supabase directly without fallback — creates data source split

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed. VAL-NAV-001 through VAL-NAV-004 and VAL-CROSS-001 all pass — sidebar renders all navigation sections with icons, all routes navigate correctly, active routes are highlighted, badge counts are wired to Supabase queries, and the full navigation flow completes without functional console errors. VAL-CROSS-006 fails because the dashboard agent count (2, from demo data) does not match the agents list page count (0, from Supabase). Issue counts are consistent across views.
